_comment: Registry of scrape days where the kino.coigdzie.pl aggregator returned zero screenings, so the merged cinema_YYYY-MM-DD.csv only contains Cinema City API + static Helios events. Downstream consumers should treat these days as incomplete.

_schema.sources_present: list of data sources that DID contribute to the merged CSV
_schema.detected_at: ISO timestamp when entry was added

incomplete_days.reason: kino.coigdzie.pl returned HTTP 200 but zero div.movie containers for all 20 cities (site rendered empty schedule)
kino.coigdzie.pl returned HTTP 500 Internal Server Error for all 20 cities
